hero.title: Night mode, exactly the way you want it.
hero.lead: MuraNight applies a soft, adjustable and customizable dark layer to any web page — per specific URL or across all tabs, with automatic scheduling.

features.title: Everything a good night mode needs.
features.sub: Fine-grained control over every page, without the hassle.

items.title: Per-URL or global
items.desc: Apply only on specific sites or across all pages. Each URL keeps its own preference.

items.title: Adjustable intensity
items.desc: Slider from 0 to 100 (or up to 200% in advanced mode) with real-time application.

items.title: Custom colors
items.desc: Warm tone, blue or your favorite color via color picker and HEX input.

items.title: Scheduling
items.desc: Set start and end times to enable night mode automatically.

items.title: Profiles & export
items.desc: Save usage profiles and export/import settings to a local file.

items.title: Total privacy
items.desc: Everything runs locally in your browser. Nothing is sent to any server.

showcase1.title: Customize every detail.
showcase1.desc: Choose a warm tone to reduce blue light at night, blue for a cool and modern look, or create your own color.

showcase2.title: Advanced settings, simple to use.
showcase2.desc: Access profiles, language, maximum intensity and data management from a clean interface.
items: Reset saved settings at any time
Import and export profiles as JSON

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.sub: Everything you need to know before installing.

items.q: Does MuraNight collect my browsing data?
items.a: No. All settings are stored locally in your browser via chrome.storage.local. There is no data transmission, telemetry or advertising.
The extension uses the origin + pathname + search identifier (ignoring the hash) to remember the configuration of each specific page. You can enable night mode on one site without affecting others.

items.q: Does it work on Microsoft Edge?
items.a: Yes. MuraNight is a Manifest V3 extension compatible with Chrome, Edge and other Chromium-based browsers.

items.q: Why does the extension request access to "all URLs"?
items.a: So that night mode can be applied to any site you choose. This access is used exclusively to inject the dark style — no page content is read, saved or transmitted.

items.q: Can I back up my settings?
items.a: Yes. In Settings → File you can export your settings to a JSON file and import it later on another browser or after reinstalling the extension.
Yes. Completely free, no ads, no paid version.

cta_band.title: Ready for a more comfortable night?
cta_band.desc: Add MuraNight to your browser and customize every page your way.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: MuraNight is a browser extension that applies a configurable night mode to web pages chosen by the user. This Privacy Policy explains what data the extension handles and how it is used.

sections.body:
MuraNight stores the following data locally in the user's browser:
  • Extension settings, such as intensity, color, language, schedule, and saved profiles.
  • Website identifiers needed to remember per-page preferences. These identifiers are based on the page URL (origin + pathname + search, excluding the hash).

This data is used only to provide the extension's user-facing features:
  • Apply or remove night mode on the current page.
  • Remember per-page or global preferences.
  • Restore saved preferences when the user opens a page again.
  • Let the user export or import their own settings file manually.

• MuraNight does not sell user data.
  • MuraNight does not share user data with third parties.
  • MuraNight does not use user data for advertising, profiling, or analytics.
MuraNight does not transmit browsing data or extension settings to the developer's servers or to any third party. All processing happens locally in the browser.

Users can, at any time:
  • Change or delete saved settings inside the extension.
  • Reset saved data from the extension UI.
  • Export their settings to a local file.
  • Import a settings file they previously exported.
  • Remove the extension at any time through the browser.

The extension requests the storage permission to store its settings locally, and host_permissions for all URLs (<all_urls>) for the sole purpose of injecting the night-mode style into pages where the user enables the feature. No page content is read, stored, or transmitted.
The extension is designed to process its settings locally in the browser and avoids remote code execution.
Any changes to this Privacy Policy will be published on this page, with the updated date revised at the top.
For questions about this policy or the extension, please contact us at: contato@gustasoares.com.
